case.notice: Entirely fictional. No real person, clinic record, recording, or contact data is included.

source_packets.label: Client report
source_packets.content: The client reported that perceived effort felt unchanged during a short balance task. The report did not specify symptoms or observed performance.

source_packets.label: Practitioner observation
source_packets.content: In the same fictional session, the practitioner recorded two hand contacts during the final three repetitions. No symptom or cause assessment was performed.

suggested_answers.report-dimension: The client was describing perceived effort only, not symptoms or observed task performance.
suggested_answers.conflict-interpretation: They describe different dimensions. Preserve both statements without treating either one as inaccurate.
